publishedAbstract: The containers `kube-rbac-proxy-main` and `kube-rbac-proxy-self`, which are `ocs-metrics-exporter` sidecars, are logging full Kubernetes service account bearer tokens in plaintext.
publishedTitle: ODF:  The containers "kube-rbac-proxy-main" and "kube-rbac-proxy-self", which are "ocs-metrics-exporter" sidecars, are logging full Kubernetes service account bearer tokens in plaintext.
